testcase.name: integrationTest_Logout_Redirects

where id=? 2026-03-06T16:50:52.538+05:30 DEBUG 32920 --- [GameApp] [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Created HttpSession as SecurityContext is non-default o.s.s.web.DefaultRedirectStrategy : Redirecting to /login?logout=true
